title: Documents native edit flow
description: Native document edits can be proposed, viewed, accepted, rejected, and protected by stale-version conflict handling.
userPrompt: Use the Talk result to propose a document edit, then accept one edit, reject a second edit, and attempt a stale accept.
expectedDynamics: The route surface works on documents, doc_tabs, doc_blocks, and document_edits without relying on markdown/html content facades.

checks.description: Documents, tabs, and blocks are listed/read from native records.
A pending document_edit is visible with base version and target block metadata.
Accept applies the edit, reject leaves content unchanged, and stale accept returns conflict.
The flow does not depend on bodyMarkdown/bodyHtml projections.
